description: From Big Success to Bigger Wins (BIGGER) is an ATC-20 memecoin overtaking the hype from Solana’s BIG to AtlantisChain’s BIGGER. Launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — BIGGER gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, driving it forward with unmatched momentum throughout the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: From Big Success to Bigger Wins
